bbox.description: Only features that have a geometry that intersects the bounding box are selected.The bounding box is provided as four or six numbers, depending on whether the coordinate reference system includes a vertical axis (height or depth).
bbox.name: bbox

bbox-crs.description: Indicates the coordinate reference system for the given bbox coordinates.
bbox-crs.name: bbox-crs

bbox-crs-epsg.description: Indicates the EPSG for the given bbox coordinates.
bbox-crs-epsg.name: bbox-crs

crs.description: Indicates the coordinate reference system for the results.
crs.name: crs

f.description: The optional f parameter indicates the output format which the server shall provide as part of the response document.  The default format is GeoJSON.
f.name: f

lang.description: The optional lang parameter instructs the server return a response in a certain language, if supported.  If the language is not among the available values, the Accept-Language header language will be used if it is supported. If the header is missing, the default server language is used. Note that providers may only support a single language (or often no language at all), that can be different from the server language.  Language strings can be written in a complex (e.g. "fr-CA,fr;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7"), simple (e.g. "de") or locale-like (e.g. "de-CH" or "fr_BE") fashion.
lang.name: lang

offset.description: The optional offset parameter indicates the index within the result set from which the server shall begin presenting results in the response document.  The first element has an index of 0 (default).
offset.name: offset

skipGeometry.description: This option can be used to skip response geometries for each feature.
skipGeometry.name: skipGeometry
